title: Vicloon Bottle & Brush 12-Piece Cleaning Set for Tubes, Keyboards, Test Tubes, Kettles, Sinks, Bottles, Coffee Machines
features: 【CLEANING MORE EFFECTIVELY】This upgrade design cleaning brush is perfect for blind angle cleaning.Small and soft cleaning brush set clean those finer detail. Easy to get into hard-to-reach spaces, such as U-shaped and arc-shaped products.
【HIGH QUALITY BRUSHES】This small brush cleaner is made of stainless steel and nylon bristles, is not easy to pluck. Easy to clean, safe dishwasher,will not rust.
【VARIOUS SIZE】12pcs long cleaning brushes with different diameters from 1.5mm to 21mm(1/16 in to 5/6 in), all brushes are 21 cm long.
【DETACHABLE KEY RING】The flexible brushes come with a detachable key ring for quick and easy access. All brushes have a loop at the end of the handle.It is convenient to hung up.

【WIDE APPLICATION 】This pipe brush are widely used at life, it can be used as airbrushes, drip tips brush, colandersbaby bottle brush,straw brush, coffee machine cleaning brushes, kettle brush, pipe brush, etc.
description: Product Description Vicloon nylon tube brush cleaner will be your best choice. Choose one for your kitchen today! Vicloon nylon tube brush for airbrushes, small bottles, cell phones, colanders, straws, whisk ends, espresso machines, glasses, etc. Two Brush Head Designs The brush head with bristles can better clean the bottom of the bottle, and the one without bristles can not only prevent scratching your items, but also avoid scratching your hands. Different sizes Brushes for pipes of different sizes: 1 / 16.1 / 9.1 / 6.1 / 5.1 / 4.1 / 3.2 / 5.1 / 2.3 / 5.2 / 3.3 / 4, 5/6 cm. All brushes have a practical loop at the end of the handle. Facilitates suspension and saves space for your kitchen. Extra detachable keychains can help you store these brushes. ------------------------------------------------------------------Applications----------------------------------------------------------- Widely use The lever of the tube brush is flexible, can clean the corners, can effectively remove stubborn dirt, soft handle, easy to use. Suitable for milk bottles, spout of the kettle, test tubes, glass bottle and small nozzle, espresso machine, etc.
